headline: Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) Faces Lower Rent Growth Expectations, Scotiabank Says
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 4.66%, Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE:MAA) is included among the 10 High Yield Stocks for Lasting Retirement Income. Top 100 Places Where the Rich People Own Real Estate On May 14, Scotiabank downgraded Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE:MAA) to Underperform from Sector Perform and lowered its price target to $120 from […]
